response.overview: The Antidote (1927) England B&W : One reel Directed by Thomas Bentley  Cast: Jameson Thomas [Professor Gilbert Oliver], Primrose Morgan [Marion Oliver, his wife], Walter Sanders [Richard Manning]  De Forest Phonofilm [United Kingdom] production. / From a sketch by Ben Landeck. / Released April 1927. / Phonofilm 35mm spherical format. Phonofilm sound-on-film synchronized sound system. / Full-sound film.  Drama.  Synopsis: A man is bitten by a snake in Malaysia.
response.title: The Antidote
